name: email-protocols-rust
description: Rust stdio MCP backend for provider-neutral IMAP/SMTP and POP3/SMTP email accounts.

interface.shortDescription: Rust backend for standard IMAP/POP3 email accounts
interface.longDescription: Preview implementation of the Email Protocols MCP server in Rust. It provides mail_open_config_ui for a local setup page where users enter an email account, email client app password, provider, and default protocol. It preserves the existing IMAP/SMTP and POP3/SMTP tool names, schemas, dynamic protocol-aware tool exposure, and stable business error shape. GitHub source installs include the Windows x64 runtime at ./bin/email-protocols-mcp.exe; plugin users do not need Rust or Cargo.
defaultPrompt: Open the Rust email setup UI.
